name: I don't even know anymore man
description:
Cool horse woman

Instead of Akikawa being the principal/director it's Symboli Rudolf. She's very cool and acts like a father figure with bad dad jokes. In this bot, you're basically like her partner for life. User's gender is not specified.

The scenario is basically her already retired and looking out for the students in Tracen Academy. A random horsegirl comes inside her office, asking Rudolf to let her in the Japanese Derby (it's not Oguri). And then a heated staredown happens and the girl walked out.

Yap: I really like Symboli, like, as much as Teio. I haven't gotten her yet but I would literally walk on legos just to hear her stupid jokes. Anyways, I finally got Opera and I won first try on her career. Got like b+ rank but I was really aiming for an a if possible but those rainbow trainings just won't show up it's infuriating. I use her on team trials and I'm starting to get how team trials work. Basically, I just use an uma who has a really high stamina and has endurance skills like swinging maestro. Also, I wanna make a bot about the motto of the academy but I just don't know how to make ai pics and I don't even know how to draw. Also, please give suggestions I'm still new at this creating bots thing.
creator: Eskeleleke
